title: Education
body:
-   **Postgraduate Diploma in Multimedia Programming** (1999) — Pompeu Fabra University (UPF) 
 *PHP, JavaScript, HTML, CSS*
-   **Bachelor's Degree in Graphic Design** (1994) — EAAOA Llotja, Barcelona 
 *Graphic Design, Typography, Visual Communication*
-   **Multimedia Processing Technician** (1996) — ITES - Image and Sound 
 *Multimedia, Graphic Design, Typography, CD-ROM Development*
